subject: A winged chimeric creature soaring above the open sea, with iridescent magenta-pink plumage, large outstretched feathered wings, and a serpentine bird-like form trailing tail feathers
description: A radiant chimera with iridescent magenta and violet plumage glides across a bright sky, its enormous feathered wings spread wide. The creature has a sleek, serpentine body with a long trailing tail and a sharp avian head turned in profile. Below it, the ocean stretches to a distant horizon, with whitecaps and rolling waves catching cool blue-cyan light. The composition is wide and airy, emphasizing flight and openness, with the creature backlit against a hazy sky.
foreground: Iridescent winged chimera in mid-flight with outspread feathered wings and trailing tail
background: Open ocean with rolling waves under a hazy bright sky meeting a distant horizon
